generated_oml:
instance PermanentMagnetMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent‑magnet synchronous motor of MABI MAX 100 first rotary axis providing torque to drive the gearboxes."
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor current sensor that measures the electrical current of the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor position encoder that provides joint angle of the motor shaft."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder positioned behind the gearbox to measure joint angle after the gear reduction."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance MotorAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorAngleEncoder
]

instance GearboxAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxAngleEncoder
]

instance MeasuredMotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor current stream received from the motor current sensor."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
]

instance MeasuredMotorAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor shaft angle received from the motor encoder."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
]

instance MeasuredGearboxAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured gearbox output angle received from the secondary encoder."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
]

instance MotorVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Calculated motor velocity derived from the motor angle data."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ProcessingComponent
]

instance MotorTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Calculated motor torque derived from the motor current and motor velocity data."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ProcessingComponent
]

instance GearboxVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Calculated gearbox velocity derived from the gearbox angle data."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ProcessingComponent
]

instance GearboxTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Calculated gearbox torque derived from motor torque and gearbox speed."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorTorqueData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ProcessingComponent
]

instance SystemVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Overall system velocity derived from gearbox velocity."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxVelocityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ProcessingComponent
]

instance SystemTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Overall system torque derived from gearbox torque."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxTorqueData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ProcessingComponent
]

instance SimulatedMotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulation output of motor current from MATLAB Simulink model."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedMotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance SimulatedMotorTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulation output of motor torque from MATLAB Simulink model."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedMotorTorqueDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance SimulatedGearboxVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulation output of gearbox velocity from MATLAB Simulink model."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedGearboxVelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance SimulatedSystemTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulation output of overall system torque from MATLAB Simulink model."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedSystemTorqueDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance SimulatedMotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SystemSimModel
]

instance SimulatedMotorTorqueDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SystemSimModel
]

instance SimulatedGearboxVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SystemSimModel
]

instance SimulatedSystemTorqueDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SystemSimModel
]

instance MotorStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Structural SysML model of the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance GearboxStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Structural SysML model of the gearwheel gearbox."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance CycloidalGearboxStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Structural SysML model of the cycloidal gearbox."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance RobotAxis1SysMLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Integrated SysML model of the first rotary axis, including motor, gearwheel, and cycloidal gearboxes."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb‑viscous friction model used for white‑box identification."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ProcessingComponent
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model used for white‑box identification."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ProcessingComponent
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model used for black‑box identification."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ProcessingComponent
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model used for black‑box identification."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ProcessingComponent
]

instance SystemSimModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model of the complete first axis system (motor, gearboxes, and friction dynamics)."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance MQTTProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol enabling real‑time streaming of sensor data from the robot to the digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataIntegrationService, RealTimeDataVisualizationDashboard
]

instance SimulinkEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink executable simulation engine used for motor, gearbox, and friction models."
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService, OnlineFrictionIdentificationService, DataComparisonService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell providing asset description, metadata, and model registration."
    DTDFVocab:enables InsightGenerationService
]

instance DashboardUI : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom dashboard UI for visualizing real‑time data and model results."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataVisualizationDashboard
]

instance ProcessingComponent : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Processing component that executes simulation and data‑calculation models for friction identification and insight derivation."
    DTDFVocab:enables OnlineFrictionIdentificationService, DataComparisonService, InsightGenerationService
]

instance DataIntegrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service responsible for ingesting sensor data streams via MQTT into the digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataIngestionInsight
]

instance DataIngestionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight derived from data ingestion service."
]

instance RealTimeDataVisualizationDashboard : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time data visualization dashboard displaying measured and simulated motor and gearbox data."
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance OnlineFrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service performing continuous online identification of joint friction using white‑box and black‑box models."
    DTDFVocab:provides JointFrictionEstimate
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service executing MATLAB Simulink simulations of motor, gearbox, and system behavior."
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultInsight
]

instance DataComparisonService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service comparing simulated traces with measured sensor data for validation."
    DTDFVocab:provides ComparisonInsight
]

instance InsightGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service generating actionable insights and control actions based on friction estimates and performance."
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlParameterAdjustmentInsight, PreventiveMaintenanceInsight
]

instance JointFrictionEstimate : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimate of joint friction dynamics derived from simultaneous white‑box and black‑box model execution."
]

instance SimulationResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation outputs of motor current, torque, and gearbox velocity for comparison with real‑world data."
]

instance ComparisonInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Comparison of simulated versus measured traces for validation and model refinement."
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual representation of current and torque data streams for operational monitoring."
]

instance ControlParameterAdjustmentInsight : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjustment of control parameters to improve positioning accuracy based on friction estimates."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PreventiveMaintenanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Recommendation for preventive maintenance actions informed by friction dynamics analysis."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance PermanentMagnetMotorComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Permanent‑magnet synchronous motor forming the actuation element of the first rotary axis."
]

instance GearwheelGearboxComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gearwheel gearbox providing transmission between motor and cycloidal gearbox."
]

instance CycloidalGearboxComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox converting gearwheel rotation to precise joint motion."
]

instance MABIMAX100Axis1Environment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PermanentMagnetMotorComponent, GearwheelGearboxComponent, CycloidalGearboxComponent
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestration of sensor ingestion via MQTT, a processing component that consumes raw data traces and runs simulation models, generation of simulated data traces, aggregation and abstraction into the digital shadow, and exposure of aggregated data and insights through a visualization dashboard."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase – the digital shadow represents the system during operation, providing continuous monitoring and friction estimation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "All data points are traceable to their source (sensor, simulation, or processing component); continuous comparison of simulated versus measured traces validates friction models; combination of analytical white‑box and data‑driven black‑box models enhances accuracy; model identification over time addresses wear and tool changes."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Sensor data communicated over MQTT from the robot to the digital shadow; Asset Administration Shell used for metadata and configuration; typical Ethernet network assumed for MQTT transport."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standard for asset metadata; use of SysML and MBSE practices; Simulink and MQTT adhere to industry‑standard modeling and communication protocols."
]
